title: Executive Director, Global Technology Service Delivery
raw_jd:
About the job

BeOne continues to grow at a rapid pace with challenging and exciting opportunities for experienced professionals. When considering candidates, we look for scientific and business professionals who are highly motivated, collaborative, and most importantly, share our passionate interest in fighting cancer.

The Executive Director, Global Technology Service Delivery is a senior leadership role in the Global Technology Solutions (GTS) Enterprise Technology and Architecture team. They are responsible for driving the strategy, governance, and operational excellence of enterprise technology services across the organization. This position oversees global technology platforms, ensuring seamless delivery of end user computing, collaboration platforms, end-user support, and IT service management (ITSM) capabilities.

This role demands technical expertise, strong leadership, and the capacity to drive transformation while ensuring end-user productivity, compliance, and innovation in a regulated pharmaceutical and life sciences setting.

Essential Functions Of The Job

Strategic Leadership & Governance

    Define and execute the global technology strategy aligned with business objectives and regulatory requirements.
    Establish governance frameworks for technology services, ensuring compliance with data privacy/residency laws, GxP and other industry standards.
    Partner with senior business and technology leaders to drive digital transformation initiatives and operational efficiency.

Technology Oversight

    Lead global support services, including Microsoft 365 administration, end user computing, enterprise collaboration platforms, and communication tools.
    Oversee global helpdesk operations, ensuring high-quality, timely support for end-users across all regions.
    Manage IT Service Management (ITSM) processes and platforms, driving continuous improvement and automation.
    Ensure reliable conference room technology and site support services for global offices and facilities.
    Drive the deployment of ServiceNow to support enhanced ITSM process and procedures.

Service Delivery & Performance

    Develop and monitor KPIs and SLAs for technology services, ensuring exceptional user experience and operational resilience.
    Implement proactive monitoring and incident management strategies to minimize downtime and disruptions.
    Drive vendor management and strategic partnerships to optimize service delivery and cost efficiency.

Compliance & Risk Management

    Ensure adherence to data privacy, cybersecurity, and regulatory compliance requirements within pharma and life sciences.
    Lead audits and risk assessments for technology services, implementing corrective actions as needed.

Team Leadership & Development

    Build and lead a high-performing global team, fostering a culture of collaboration, accountability, and innovation.
    Mentor and develop talent, ensuring succession planning and career growth opportunities.
    Partner closely with regional technology leaders to ensure alignment on strategy.
    Partner with cybersecurity team to ensure the highest standards of security are applied and maintained to the technology stack.
    Partner with BeOne technology leaders and stakeholders to ensure technology stack supports business goals.
    Manage vendor relationships and negotiate contracts for operational services.

Qualifications

    14+ years in technology service delivery leadership roles, with at least 8 years in a global leadership capacity.
    Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field; advanced degree preferred.
    Proven experience managing global solutions including Microsoft 365, Azure, ITSM platforms (e.g., ServiceNow), enterprise collaboration tools (e.g. MS Teams), end user computing and services.
    Strong background in pharmaceutical or life sciences industry, with knowledge of GxP, HIPPAA and regulatory compliance.
    Expertise in managing global helpdesk and site support services
    Strategic thinking with ability to execute operational excellence.
    Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
    Strong vendor management and negotiation capabilities.
    ITIL Expert or equivalent in IT Service Management
    Microsoft Certified: Enterprise Administrator Expert
    PMP or similar project management certification (pref).

Global Competencies

When we exhibit our values of Patients First, Driving Excellence, Bold Ingenuity and Collaborative Spirit, through our twelve global competencies below, we help get more affordable medicines to more patients around the world.

    Fosters Teamwork
    Provides and Solicits Honest and Actionable Feedback
    Self-Awareness
    Acts Inclusively
    Demonstrates Initiative
    Entrepreneurial Mindset
    Continuous Learning
    Embraces Change
    Results-Oriented
    Analytical Thinking/Data Analysis
    Financial Excellence
    Communicates with Clarity

Salary Range: $278,200.00 - $358,200.00 annually

BeOne is committed to fair and equitable compensation practices. Actual compensation packages are determined by several factors that are unique to each candidate, including but not limited to job-related skills, depth of experience, certifications, relevant education or training, and specific work location. Packages may vary by location due to differences in the cost of labor. The recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for a preferred location during the hiring process. Please note that the listed range reflects the base salary or hourly range only. Non-Commercial roles are eligible to participate in the annual bonus plan, and Commercial roles are eligible to participate in an incentive compensation plan. All Company employees have the opportunity to own shares of BeOne Medicines Ltd. stock because all employees are eligible for discretionary equity awards and to voluntarily participate in the Employee Stock Purchase Plan. The Company has a comprehensive benefits package that includes Medical, Dental, Vision, 401(k), FSA/HSA, Life Insurance, Paid Time Off, and Wellness.

We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. BeOne does not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, national origin, veteran status or any other basis covered by appropriate law. All employment is decided on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. In order to ensure reasonable accommodation for individuals protected by Section 503 of the Rehabilitation Act of 1973, the Vietnam Era Veterans’ Readjustment Assistance Act of 1974, Title I of the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990, and any other applicable federal, state or local laws, applicants who require reasonable accommodation in the job application process may contact accommodationsus@beonemed.com.

Benefits found in job post

401(k)

score.skills_rationale: Strong match with Microsoft 365, Azure, ITSM platforms like ServiceNow, and enterprise technology leadership. However, this role is more IT service delivery focused vs. the candidate's deep data/analytics specialization. Missing some pharma/GxP specific experience.
score.scope_rationale: Excellent match - this is a senior executive leadership role requiring 14+ years experience with 8+ in global leadership. Candidate has the exact leadership trajectory, team building, and strategic technology oversight experience required.
score.pay_rationale: Salary range of $278K-$358K is well above candidate's W2 target range of $160K-$220K, indicating strong pay alignment.
red_flags: significant industry shift from government/education to pharma
heavy emphasis on IT service delivery vs. data/analytics focus
score.raw_analysis: This is a legitimate senior executive role at a pharmaceutical company requiring deep IT service delivery leadership. While the candidate has strong technology leadership and Microsoft platform experience, this represents a significant industry and functional shift from their data/analytics focus to IT operations. The role requires pharma regulatory expertise (GxP) and specific certifications the candidate lacks, but the leadership scope and strategic technology oversight align well with their background.

cover_letters.content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

As a senior technology leader with 25+ years of experience driving enterprise-scale transformations, I am positioned to deliver immediate impact as Executive Director, Global Technology Service Delivery at BeOne. My current role leading data architecture for the Department of Veterans Affairs' $2.6B Financial Management Business Transformation program demonstrates exactly the kind of large-scale, mission-critical technology leadership this position demands. I've successfully navigated complex regulatory environments, led cross-functional teams through major ERP implementations, and built the resilient technology foundations that support organizational transformation.

My leadership experience spans the full spectrum of enterprise technology services you're seeking to optimize. At Howard University, I drove a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation as one of three cross-functional leaders during a period of executive disruption, stabilizing delivery and ensuring successful deployment. This required the same strategic thinking, stakeholder management, and operational excellence skills essential for overseeing global Microsoft 365 administration, ITSM platforms, and enterprise collaboration tools. My hands-on experience with Azure data services, combined with my track record of establishing governance frameworks and compliance processes, aligns directly with BeOne's need for someone who can ensure regulatory adherence while driving innovation.

What sets me apart is my ability to bridge technical complexity with business outcomes—precisely what's needed to transform technology service delivery in a regulated pharmaceutical environment. I've consistently delivered measurable results: designed enterprise data architectures supporting executive decision-making, established data governance policies that improved audit readiness, and led teams through high-stakes system integrations under tight deadlines. My CISSP certification demonstrates my commitment to cybersecurity excellence, while my experience mentoring technical teams and coordinating across finance, HR, and IT stakeholders proves I can build and lead the high-performing global team this role requires.

I'm ready to bring this strategic and operational expertise to BeOne's mission of fighting cancer through innovative technology solutions. The opportunity to drive digital transformation while ensuring compliance and operational excellence in a life sciences setting represents the kind of meaningful challenge where I do my best work.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear BeOne Medicines Hiring Team,

Your Executive Director role presents a compelling challenge that resonates strongly with my experience leading technology transformations in complex, regulated environments. Having spent over 25 years architecting enterprise systems and leading cross-functional teams through major platform implementations, I understand the unique demands of delivering reliable technology services while maintaining strict compliance standards. At the Department of Veterans Affairs, I'm currently leading data architecture and reporting for their $2.6B Financial Management Business Transformation, where I've learned firsthand how critical seamless technology delivery is to organizational success—and how quickly technical issues can cascade across global operations.

My leadership experience directly aligns with BeOne's need to drive both operational excellence and strategic transformation. At Howard University, I served as one of three cross-functional leaders (Finance, HR, IT) driving a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation during a period of executive disruption. When both the CIO and CFO departed mid-project, I helped stabilize delivery, resolve complex system integration challenges, and successfully deploy the platform. This experience taught me the importance of building resilient vendor relationships, establishing clear governance frameworks, and maintaining focus on end-user productivity during major transitions—capabilities that would serve BeOne well as you scale your global technology services.

The technical scope of this role—from Microsoft 365 administration to ServiceNow deployment and global helpdesk operations—leverages expertise I've developed across multiple enterprise environments. My hands-on approach to debugging complex integrations, combined with my experience coordinating across diverse stakeholder groups (finance, acquisition, IT), positions me to bridge the gap between strategic technology vision and day-to-day operational delivery. I'm particularly drawn to BeOne's mission-driven culture and the opportunity to apply proven technology leadership practices in the fight against cancer, where reliable systems and seamless user experiences directly impact the speed of life-saving innovation.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the Executive Director, Global Technology Service Delivery role at BeOne. With 25+ years leading enterprise technology transformations and currently architecting data platforms for the Department of Veterans Affairs' $2B+ ERP modernization, I bring the strategic leadership and hands-on technical expertise needed to drive your global technology services. My experience leading cross-functional teams through complex system integrations—including serving as one of three key drivers during Howard University's multi-million-dollar Workday implementation amid executive disruption—directly aligns with your need for a leader who can execute operational excellence while navigating organizational complexity in regulated environments.

My proven track record managing Microsoft 365 ecosystems, building enterprise data architectures, and establishing governance frameworks across finance, HR, and IT functions positions me well to oversee your global technology platforms and ITSM capabilities. Having stabilized mission-critical systems, implemented data validation processes for audit readiness, and coordinated across diverse stakeholder groups, I understand the balance required between innovation and compliance in regulated industries. I'm excited about the opportunity to leverage this experience to drive BeOne's technology strategy and ensure seamless service delivery across your global operations.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

tailored_resume:
SALIL MANIKTAHLA
Springfield, VA  ·  571-215-8218  ·  salil.maniktahla@gmail.com  ·  linkedin.com/in/salilmaniktahla

SUMMARY
Senior technology executive with 25+ years of experience leading global technology service delivery, enterprise platform management, and strategic technology initiatives. Currently directing data architecture and technology integration for the Department of Veterans Affairs' enterprise transformation program, with deep expertise in Microsoft 365, Azure, ServiceNow, and enterprise technology governance across complex, regulated environments.

Proven track record of building and leading high-performing global teams, driving digital transformation initiatives, and delivering operational excellence in technology service delivery. Experienced in managing enterprise collaboration platforms, end-user computing services, and IT service management across multi-site operations while ensuring compliance, performance optimization, and strategic vendor partnerships.

CORE CAPABILITIES
Technology Service Delivery Leadership
    • Global technology platform oversight including Microsoft 365, Azure, enterprise collaboration tools
    • End-user computing services, helpdesk operations, and site support management
    • IT Service Management (ITSM) processes, platforms, and continuous improvement initiatives

Strategic Technology Governance
    • Technology strategy development aligned with business objectives and regulatory requirements
    • Governance frameworks ensuring compliance with data privacy, security standards, and audit requirements
    • Vendor management and strategic partnerships for service delivery optimization

Team Leadership & Operations
    • Cross-functional technical leadership and global team management
    • Stakeholder management across Finance, IT, and business operations
    • Performance monitoring, KPI development, and service level management

Enterprise Platform Integration
    • ERP system integration, data pipelines, and enterprise architecture
    • System reliability, monitoring, and incident management
    • Digital transformation and technology modernization initiatives

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Senior Data & Analytics Architect (Contractor)
U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs – FMBT	Sep 2021 – Present
    • Lead technology integration and service delivery workstreams supporting VA's enterprise transformation program across multiple business units and geographic regions
    • Oversee enterprise platform integration including ERP systems, data services, and reporting infrastructure serving thousands of end-users
    • Establish governance frameworks and compliance processes ensuring data quality, audit readiness, and regulatory adherence
    • Coordinate across finance, acquisition, and IT stakeholders to resolve system issues, optimize service delivery, and meet organizational objectives
    • Provide hands-on technical leadership in system integration challenges, performance optimization, and service continuity
    • Drive vendor coordination and platform management to ensure seamless technology service delivery

Business Intelligence Analyst – Finance
Howard University	Apr 2020 – Jul 2024
    • Served as key technology leader in multi-million-dollar Workday enterprise platform implementation, providing strategic oversight during executive transitions and organizational change
    • Led cross-functional technology delivery teams across Finance, HR, and IT divisions to drive successful platform deployment and user adoption
    • Established enterprise data governance frameworks and technology service standards improving system reliability and user experience
    • Collaborated directly with C-level executives on technology strategy, platform optimization, and operational performance
    • Designed and implemented enterprise technology architecture supporting university-wide operations and decision-making
    • Managed vendor relationships and platform administration for critical business systems

BI Partner / Strategist (Independent Consultant)
Multiple Clients	Jul 2016 – Mar 2020
    • Led technology service delivery and platform management initiatives across multiple enterprise clients
    • Managed technology teams and coordinated service delivery aligned with governance processes and organizational objectives
    • Delivered enterprise technology solutions supporting 350+ users globally across distributed operations
    • Mentored technical teams and supported organizational development across technology and operational functions
    • Evaluated and optimized technology platforms for performance, scalability, and service delivery excellence

Co-Founder / CEO & Technical Director
Urban Evolution	Apr 2010 – Apr 2020
    • Served as CEO and CTO for multi-location franchise operation, owning technology strategy, service delivery, and all enterprise systems
    • Built and managed IT infrastructure and technology services across multiple geographic locations
    • Led hiring, training, and development for business and technical teams supporting franchise operations
    • Designed and implemented technology platforms supporting operational performance and business growth

VitalSpring Technologies
BI Senior Manager	May 2008 – Jul 2016
    • Served as Product Manager for enterprise technology and analytics initiatives across healthcare supply chain operations
    • Led Agile delivery teams and technology service management across multiple business units
    • Designed technology solutions identifying operational bottlenecks and driving cost savings exceeding $70K annually
    • Mentored technical teams and coordinated technology delivery aligned with business objectives

EARLIER EXPERIENCE
Senior BI Consultant – Claraview (Teradata), 2006–2008
    • Technical architect for 25,000-user enterprise technology platform (Lowe's); defined technology strategy and KPIs for Fortune 100 client
BI Consultant – Kinetic Networks, 2005–2006
    • Delivered enterprise technology solutions for Google, Yahoo, Wells Fargo
IT Specialist – U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, 2002–2005
    • Led team of 6 engineers and developers; defined IT strategy and managed technology services for National Center for Environmental Economics; maintained Public Trust clearance
Operations Manager – MicroStrategy, 1999–2001
    • Led systems engineering team; delivered integrated technology platforms; achieved ~$312K annual cost savings through vendor optimization and service delivery improvements

SELECTED SYSTEMS & INNOVATION
    • Designed enterprise-grade platform architecture combining containerized services, monitoring systems, and secure access controls
    • Built technology infrastructure supporting distributed operations with high-availability requirements and performance optimization
    • Implemented enterprise service delivery platforms with role-based access, audit logging, and compliance frameworks
    • Operate advanced technology infrastructure (10GbE backbone, enterprise storage, containerized services, high-availability routing)

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Enterprise Platforms: Microsoft 365, Azure (data services), ServiceNow, enterprise collaboration tools
Technology Management: ITSM processes, vendor management, service delivery optimization
Infrastructure: Linux (Ubuntu), Docker, distributed systems, networking, enterprise architecture
Development: SQL, Python, ETL/ELT, CI/CD practices, containerized environments
Compliance: Data governance, audit frameworks, system validation and monitoring

CERTIFICATIONS & EDUCATION
B.A., Washington University in St. Louis
CISSP  ·  Certified Scrum Master  ·  Tableau Certified Professional  ·  MicroStrategy Certified Developer
